## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## User Impact

- What user workflow does this change affect?
- Which provider, permission flow, or insertion path is touched?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual test completed

## Manual Test Notes

Describe exactly what you tested.

- [ ] Recording / microphone
- [ ] Global hotkey
- [ ] Accessibility text insertion
- [ ] Provider configuration
- [ ] Personal terms / hotwords
- [ ] Packaging or docs only

## Risk

Call out behavior changes, migration concerns, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I updated provider guides if a provider flow changed
- [ ] I avoided unrelated refactors
